IRouter which includes callbacks for Uniswap V3, PancakeSwap V3, Algebra (Camelot/QuickSwap V3), and Uniswap V4 pools","errors":{"QuoteRevert(uint256,uint256,uint160,uint256)":[{"details":"Custom error for returning quote results via revert"}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"algebraSwapCallback(int256,int256,bytes)":{"details":"Called by Algebra-based pools during swap execution. Algebra's pool `swap` is      selector-identical to Uniswap V3, so `_swapV3` drives it unchanged \u2014 only the      mid-swap re-entry differs by name. The callback context (expectedPool/payer/      tokenIn) and the msg.sender check are identical, so it delegates to the shared      V3 handler. Authentication is via transient context + msg.sender, never callback      data, so the ignored `bytes` is safe."},"lockAcquired(bytes)":{"details":"Called by the Vault during lock execution (the Infinity analogue of unlockCallback).      If isQuote=true, executes the swap and reverts with QuoteRevert (no settlement)."},"maverickV2SwapCallback(address,uint256,uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Authentication is via transient context + msg.sender (the pool), never callback      data, mirroring the V3 handler. The pool supplies `amountIn` to pay; the token to      pay is the input token stored in the transient context (identical to the callback's      `tokenIn` arg)."},"pancakeV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,bytes)":{"details":"Called by PancakeSwap V3 pools during swap execution"},"quote((uint8,address,(address,address,uint24,int24,address),address,address,address,int256,uint160))":{"details":"Uses simulate-and-revert pattern to get accurate results","params":{"params":"Quote parameters including stateView for V4"},"returns":{"result":"Quote result with amountOut, priceAfter, etc."}},"quoteInfinityBin(address,(address,address,address,address,uint24,bytes32),bool,int128)":{"details":"sqrtPriceAfter is 0 \u2014 Bin pools have no sqrt-price concept (same as LB/Curve)."},"quoteInfinityCL(address,(address,address,address,address,uint24,bytes32),bool,int256,uint160)":{"details":"Flash accounting \u2014 the lock unwinds via QuoteRevert before any settlement."},"simulateSwap((uint8,address,(address,address,uint24,int24,address),address,address,address,int256,uint160))":{"details":"Called by quote() - always reverts with QuoteRevert error"},"swap((uint8,address,(address,address,uint24,int24,address),address,address,int256,uint160,address,address))":{"params":{"params":"Unified swap parameters"},"returns":{"amount0":"The delta of token0/currency0","amount1":"The delta of token1/currency1"}},"swapInfinityBin(address,(address,address,address,address,uint24,bytes32),bool,int128,address,address)":{"details":"amountSpecified must be NEGATIVE (exact input). swapForY=true swaps tokenX (currency0)      for tokenY (currency1) \u2014 the zeroForOne analogue. Bin pools take no price limit.","returns":{"amount0":"-amountIn (input delta, always negative)","amount1":"+amountOut (output delta, always positive)"}},"swapInfinityCL(address,(address,address,address,address,uint24,bytes32),bool,int256,uint160,address,address)":{"details":"Both Infinity managers report deltas to the ONE Vault, so `vault` (not the manager) is      locked; the manager is carried inside the 6-field key. amountSpecified must be NEGATIVE      (exact input \u2014 Infinity/V4 convention, verified in CLPool.sol).","returns":{"amount0":"-amountIn (input delta, always negative)","amount1":"+amountOut (output delta, always positive)"}},"swapV3(address,address,address,int256,uint160,address,address)":{"details":"Wraps unified swap() for backwards compatibility"},"swapV4(address,(address,address,uint24,int24,address),bool,int256,uint160,address,address)":{"details":"Wraps unified swap() for backwards compatibility"},"uniswapV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,bytes)":{"details":"Called by Uniswap V3 pools during swap execution"},"unlockCallback(bytes)":{"details":"Called by PoolManager during unlock executionIf isQuote=true, executes swap and reverts with QuoteRevert (no settlement)"}},"stateVariables":{"BALANCER_V2_VAULT":{"details":"Balancer V2 Vault address (same on all EVM chains)"},"INFINITY_CONTEXT_SLOT":{"details":"Expected Vault for the in-flight Infinity lock. The callback (lockAcquired) must verify      msg.sender against this \u2014 NOT against a value decoded from callback data, which a caller      controls. One slot, disjoint from the V3/V4/Maverick context slots, so a hook executing      mid-lock cannot spoof unlockCallback (the V4 slot is empty during an Infinity lock)."},"MAVERICK_CONTEXT_SLOT":{"details":"Transient storage slot for Maverick V2 callback context"},"MAX_SQRT_RATIO":{"details":"The maximum value that can be returned from #getSqrtRatioAtTick (tick 887272)"},"MIN_SQRT_RATIO":{"details":"The minimum value that can be returned from #getSqrtRatioAtTick (tick -887272)"},"V4_CONTEXT_SLOT":{"details":"Expected PoolManager for the in-flight V4 unlock. The callback (unlockCallback) must      verify msg.sender against this \u2014 NOT against a value decoded from callback data, which      a caller controls \u2014 otherwise a forged PoolManager could drain settlement funds."}},"title":"Router","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"algebraSwapCallback(int256,int256,bytes)":{"notice":"Algebra swap callback (Camelot V3, QuickSwap V3, and algebraSwapCallback(int256,int256,bytes).details: Called by Algebra-based pools during swap execution. Algebra's pool `swap` is      selector-identical to Uniswap V3, so `_swapV3` drives it unchanged — only the      mid-swap re-entry differs by name. The callback context (expectedPool/payer/      tokenIn) and the msg.sender check are identical, so it delegates to the shared      V3 handler. Authentication is via transient context + msg.sender, never callback      data, so the ignored `bytes` is safe.

lockAcquired(bytes).details: Called by the Vault during lock execution (the Infinity analogue of unlockCallback).      If isQuote=true, executes the swap and reverts with QuoteRevert (no settlement).

maverickV2SwapCallback(address,uint256,u.details: Authentication is via transient context + msg.sender (the pool), never callback      data, mirroring the V3 handler. The pool supplies `amountIn` to pay; the token to      pay is the input token stored in the transient context (identical to the callback's      `tokenIn` arg).

pancakeV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,byte.details: Called by PancakeSwap V3 pools during swap execution

quote((uint8,address,(address,address,ui.details: Uses simulate-and-revert pattern to get accurate results

params.params: Quote parameters including stateView for V4

returns.result: Quote result with amountOut, priceAfter, etc.

quoteInfinityBin(address,(address,addres.details: sqrtPriceAfter is 0 — Bin pools have no sqrt-price concept (same as LB/Curve).

quoteInfinityCL(address,(address,address.details: Flash accounting — the lock unwinds via QuoteRevert before any settlement.

simulateSwap((uint8,address,(address,add.details: Called by quote() - always reverts with QuoteRevert error

swapInfinityBin(address,(address,address.details: amountSpecified must be NEGATIVE (exact input). swapForY=true swaps tokenX (currency0)      for tokenY (currency1) — the zeroForOne analogue. Bin pools take no price limit.

swapInfinityCL(address,(address,address,.details: Both Infinity managers report deltas to the ONE Vault, so `vault` (not the manager) is      locked; the manager is carried inside the 6-field key. amountSpecified must be NEGATIVE      (exact input — Infinity/V4 convention, verified in CLPool.sol).

swapV3(address,address,address,int256,ui.details: Wraps unified swap() for backwards compatibility

swapV4(address,(address,address,uint24,i.details: Wraps unified swap() for backwards compatibility

uniswapV3SwapCallback(int256,int256,byte.details: Called by Uniswap V3 pools during swap execution

unlockCallback(bytes).details: Called by PoolManager during unlock executionIf isQuote=true, executes swap and reverts with QuoteRevert (no settlement)

algebraSwapCallback(int256,int256,bytes).notice: Algebra swap callback (Camelot V3, QuickSwap V3, and other Algebra forks)

maverickV2SwapCallback(address,uint256,u.notice: Maverick V2 swap callback — called by pool during swap

quote((uint8,address,(address,address,ui.notice: Get a quote for a swap without executing it

quoteInfinityBin(address,(address,addres.notice: Quote an exact-input Infinity Bin swap by executing and reverting (no tokens needed)

quoteInfinityCL(address,(address,address.notice: Quote an exact-input Infinity CL swap by executing and reverting (no tokens needed)

simulateSwap((uint8,address,(address,add.notice: Simulate a swap and revert with the results

swap((uint8,address,(address,address,uin.notice: Execute a swap on any supported pool type (V2, V3, V4)

swapInfinityBin(address,(address,address.notice: Execute an exact-input swap on a PancakeSwap Infinity Bin pool via the Vault lock

swapInfinityCL(address,(address,address,.notice: Execute an exact-input swap on a PancakeSwap Infinity CL pool via the Vault lock

swapV3(address,address,address,int256,ui.notice: Execute a swap directly on a V3 pool (legacy interface)

swapV4(address,(address,address,uint24,i.notice: Execute a swap directly on a V4 pool (legacy interface)
